verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When It Comes My Time to leave here And I have said my last goodbye When the Angles come to take me home up there When the call comes down from glory Saying Child your race is run Then I close my eyes and wake up over there

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Thinking now of days gone by me and of times I have been tried Have I done my best to do the thing that's right People judge you by your actions and not by your words alone What I've done for Christ Is All that's going to Last

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When am gone (X2) Will anybody know I've been Here when am gone Will they remember some things I've done Will they remember I befriended none But Most of all, will they remember I lived for Jesus Christ God's Son

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Will anybody know I've been here when am gone (X2)
